laws.title: Indiana Minimum Wage — Federal Rate Applies ($7.25/hr)
laws.summary: Indiana has not enacted a state minimum wage above the federal $7.25/hour. Indiana law preempts local governments from setting a higher minimum wage. Indiana is an at-will employment state with limited additional employer obligations beyond federal law.
compliance_actions: Comply with federal minimum wage ($7.25/hr) — no higher state rate applies
Indiana has no state paid family leave or paid sick leave law — FMLAv is the floor
Review federal law requirements (ADA, Title VII, FMLA) which apply to Indiana employees

laws.title: Indiana Non-Compete Agreements — New Disclosure Requirements (Proposed)
laws.summary: Indiana has proposed legislation that would require employers to provide prospective employees with non-compete agreements at least 14 days before their start date (advanced disclosure requirement). The bill would also restrict non-competes for employees earning below a threshold salary. Status: pending in Indiana legislature.
compliance_actions: No compliance required yet — monitor Indiana legislature for passage
Consider proactively providing non-compete agreements at offer stage (best practice regardless)
laws.momentum_level: Low — bill is in early stages
